subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! Thou art in truth the King of kings. Thou dost confer sovereignty upon whomsoever Thou willest
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم انک انت سلطان السلاطین لتوتین السلطتة من تشاء
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God

writing_refs.type_name: Selections from the Writings of the Báb
